prompt: A [former industrial space] in its current [adaptive reuse function] — [lens] wide from a position that shows both the [industrial heritage elements] and the [new use elements] simultaneously, the conversation between the original structure and its new purpose visible in a single frame: [industrial detail] and [new use detail] in the same composition, [light quality] — often industrial north light — treating both equally, [people in new use] present at human scale, cinematic adaptive reuse still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
